the sim opens on Crescelia, which the field rarely builds (0% pick) — a sim-only call; compare the meta cores below
the sim build reproduces only 33% of the field's core for Sevarog (it never builds Fire Blossom, Flux Matrix) — some of those items ride mechanics the sim doesn't model yet

coachLine: Sim-optimal for skirmish uptime: first spike lands around minute 10 (Crescelia), third item by minute 24. Take Demiurge: +16.5% on 20-second fights at minute 15.

metaBuilds.title: Physical-Def Frontline
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for physical survivability, online around minute 24 — about 8,691 effective HP vs physical in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: Mixed-Def DPS Carry
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for sustained auto DPS, online around minute 24 — about 91 auto-attack DPS in the sim.

metaBuilds.title: Physical-Def Skirmisher
metaBuilds.whyLine: Strongest meta core for 10s rotation damage, online around minute 24 — about 693 damage over a 10s rotation in the sim.
metaBuilds.optimizer: Optimizer sees 2.0× the 10s rotation damage: try Crescelia over Fist Of Razuul (sim-only — the popular pick may carry utility the sim can't see; test it).

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Steel deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 19% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover. Grux deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 28% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover. Bayle deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Greystone deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 32% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Aurora deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 21% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Zarus's main threat is Coliseum; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: They out-threaten you whenever the lane is not even: treat this as a farm-and-team lane, not a duel. Khaimera's main threat is Cull; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 28% of its bite, at the cost of 16% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover. Serath's main threat is Chastise; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Boris deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 21% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover. Rampage deals area damage — spread out so one cast can't catch the group.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Raiment of Renewal instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 21% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your kill threat peaks early-to-mid: cash it in before their later items level the exchange. Yin's main threat is Backlash; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.

matchups.gameplan: Your window is early: force trades before their core completes, and do not coin-flip fights past the crossover. Kallari's main threat is Guillotine; bait it before you commit, and armor softens the trade.

counterSwap.line: Losing lane? Third item Warden's Faith instead of Oathkeeper: their 3s all-in loses 29% of its bite, at the cost of 17% of this kit's damage.
